build_sh_sanitizer:
set -e
mkdir -p build-asan && cd build-asan
cmake .. -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=clang -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=clang++ -DWHISPER_SANITIZE_ADDRESS=ON -DWHISPER_SANITIZE_UNDEFINED=ON -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug
cmake --build . --target whisper -j$(nproc)
cd ..
clang++ -fsanitize=address,undefined,vptr -g -O0 -I. ${POC_DIR}/harness_gguf_load.c -L build-asan -lwhisper -Wl,-rpath,$PWD/build-asan -o build-asan/bin/harness_gguf_load_t1914
build_sh_cov:
set -e
mkdir -p build-cov && cd build-cov
cmake .. -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=clang -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=clang++ -DCMAKE_C_FLAGS='-fprofile-instr-generate -fcoverage-mapping' -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS='-fprofile-instr-generate -fcoverage-mapping' -DCMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS='-fprofile-instr-generate -fcoverage-mapping' -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug
cmake --build . --target whisper -j$(nproc)
cd ..
clang++ -fprofile-instr-generate -fcoverage-mapping -g -O0 -I. ${POC_DIR}/harness_gguf_load.c -L build-cov -lwhisper -Wl,-rpath,$PWD/build-cov -o build-cov/bin/harness_gguf_load_t1914
